parts.label: Radiators — front left and right (x2)
parts.function: Side-mounted aluminum radiators in the front fascia dissipate engine heat by transferring it from coolant to ambient airflow.

parts.label: Radiator fan modules (x2)
parts.function: Electric fan modules draw air through each side radiator to maintain coolant temperature at low vehicle speeds or when stationary.

parts.label: Coolant thermostat (map-controlled)
parts.function: Electronically map-controlled thermostat regulates coolant flow to the radiators based on engine load and temperature targets rather than a fixed wax element.

parts.label: Water pump (electric)
parts.function: Electric auxiliary water pump supplements the mechanical pump to ensure coolant circulation during hot-soak and after engine-off cool-down cycles.

parts.label: Main water pump (belt-driven or chain)
parts.function: Engine-driven primary water pump circulates coolant through the block, heads, and radiators to maintain operating temperature under all drive conditions.

parts.label: Coolant expansion tank
parts.function: Translucent reservoir in the engine bay accommodates coolant volume changes with temperature and provides the system fill and bleed point.

parts.label: Coolant hoses (upper and lower, x2 circuits)
parts.function: Upper and lower coolant hoses route hot coolant from the engine to the radiators and return cooled coolant back to the water pump inlet.

parts.label: Engine oil cooler / heat exchanger
parts.function: Water-to-oil heat exchanger bolted to the block transfers excess heat from engine oil into the coolant circuit to maintain safe oil operating temperatures.

parts.label: Oil temperature sensor
parts.function: NTC oil temperature sensor reports real-time oil temperature to the DME for fuel and ignition mapping adjustments and driver instrument display.

parts.label: Coolant pump housing
parts.function: Cast housing that encloses the coolant pump impeller and routes pressurized coolant flow into the engine block passages.

parts.label: Water guide housing
parts.function: Internal engine casting that directs coolant flow from the pump outlet through defined passages in the block to ensure even cylinder cooling.

parts.label: Coolant temperature sensor (engine)
parts.function: NTC sensor mounted in the engine coolant circuit reports coolant temperature to the DME for closed-loop cooling control and dashboard gauge display.

parts.label: Water level sender (coolant reservoir)
parts.function: Float-type sender in the expansion tank triggers a low-coolant warning on the instrument cluster when the coolant level drops below the minimum mark.

parts.label: Radiator air guide (left and right)
parts.function: Plastic air-guide panels channel airflow through the front radiator cores and prevent recirculation of hot air around the radiator sides.

parts.label: Coolant pipes (crossover tubes)
parts.function: Rigid aluminium crossover pipes connect the left and right coolant circuits between the engine and front radiators, spanning the engine bay.

parts.label: Coolant pump pulley
parts.function: Belt-driven pulley pressed onto the coolant pump shaft that transfers rotational drive from the accessory belt to spin the pump impeller.

parts.label: Thermostat housing seal / O-ring
parts.function: Elastomeric seal between the thermostat and its housing prevents coolant leaks at the junction under operating pressure and temperature cycling.

parts.label: Coolant reservoir pressure cap
parts.function: Pressure-relief cap on the expansion tank maintains system pressure at the specified bar rating and releases excess pressure to prevent hose damage.

parts.label: Radiator fan (secondary / centre radiator)
parts.function: Centre auxiliary radiator mounted between the two main side radiators provides supplemental cooling capacity at high ambient temperatures or track use.

parts.label: Upper radiator hose
parts.function: Carries hot coolant from the engine outlet to the top of the radiator; the primary high-pressure leg of the main cooling circuit.

parts.label: Lower radiator hose
parts.function: Returns cooled coolant from the radiator bottom tank back to the water pump inlet; the low-pressure return leg of the main cooling circuit.

parts.label: Heater hose — supply (engine to heater core)
parts.function: Flexible hose that routes hot coolant from the engine to the cabin heater core to provide interior heating.

parts.label: Heater hose — return (heater core to engine)
parts.function: Returns cooled coolant from the heater core back to the engine inlet completing the cabin heating sub-circuit.

parts.label: Heater pipeline (HVAC coolant line)
parts.function: Rigid coolant pipeline routed through the cabin/front structure connecting the HVAC heater circuit to the main engine cooling loop.

parts.label: Crossover pipe — left circuit
parts.function: Cross tube bridging the left-side coolant circuit between the engine and front radiator; maintains balanced flow in the split cooling layout.

parts.label: Crossover pipe — right circuit
parts.function: Cross tube bridging the right-side coolant circuit between the engine and front radiator; mirrors the left crossover for symmetrical flow distribution.

parts.label: Expansion tank feed hose
parts.function: Connects the pressurized cooling circuit to the expansion tank, allowing coolant to flow into the reservoir as temperature and pressure rise.

parts.label: Coolant overflow hose
parts.function: Routes excess coolant vented from the reservoir pressure cap back into the system or to a safe drain path, preventing spillage on hot components.

parts.label: Coolant distributor tube — left
parts.function: Internal distribution tube directing coolant to multiple outlets on the left cylinder bank for balanced jacket cooling.

parts.label: Coolant distributor tube — right
parts.function: Internal distribution tube directing coolant to multiple outlets on the right cylinder bank for balanced jacket cooling.

parts.label: Coolant bleeder screw
parts.function: Bleed screw at the high points of the cooling circuit allows trapped air to be purged during fill and top-up procedures to prevent air-lock.

parts.label: Coolant temperature sensor — radiator outlet
parts.function: Second NTC temperature sensor positioned at the radiator outlet monitors coolant temperature returning from the radiators; used by the DME and electric fan control logic.

parts.label: Coolant drain plug / sealing plug
parts.function: Block-mounted sealing plug opened during coolant service to gravity-drain the engine block passages; re-sealed with a new washer to prevent weeping.

parts.label: Radiator fan — left (electric)
parts.function: Left-side electric pusher/puller fan mounts behind the left front radiator and activates based on coolant temperature or AC compressor demand.

parts.label: Fan control module (radiator fan relay/controller)
parts.function: Electronic module receives DME and AC signals to regulate electric radiator fan speed via PWM or relay switching, enabling variable-speed cooling management.

parts.label: Coolant breather / vent line
parts.function: Small-bore flexible line that vents air from high points in the cooling circuit to the expansion tank, maintaining a full liquid-filled system.

parts.label: Internal coolant water pipe (block)
parts.function: Cast or pressed water pipe inside the engine block routing coolant from the pump outlet into the internal galleries for cylinder and head cooling.

parts.label: AC condenser air guide / cooling interaction
parts.function: Air-guide duct ahead of the AC condenser ensures ram air flows through the condenser before reaching the engine radiator; condenser heat rejected here is additive to the total frontal heat-rejection load shared with the engine cooling fan circuit.

parts.label: PDK fluid cooler (transmission oil cooler)
parts.function: Heat exchanger for PDK dual-clutch transmission fluid, mounted in the cooling circuit on PDK-equipped 981 variants; uses engine coolant as the heat-sink medium to warm transmission fluid from cold and cap peak temperatures.

parts.label: Water hose — reservoir circuit
parts.function: Short connecting hose between the expansion tank and the main coolant circuit neck, completing the pressurized reservoir loop.
